name: browser-use
description: Give Kimi a real browser — your Chrome or a Browser Use Cloud browser. Use it whenever a task involves a website or web app: browsing, scraping and data extraction, filling forms, testing sites, taking screenshots, automating web workflows.
skillInstructions: If the browser-use MCP server from this plugin is connected, prefer its mcp__browser-use__browser_exec and mcp__browser-use__browser_screenshot tools over invoking the browser-use CLI in a shell. Both expose the same helper namespace.

interface.shortDescription: Real browser control — your Chrome or a Browser Use Cloud browser
interface.longDescription: Registers the Browser Use MCP server (browser_exec + browser_screenshot, self-installing via uv) and a skill that teaches direct browser-use CLI usage. Drive real Chrome over CDP: navigate, click, type, extract, screenshot — or spin up isolated Browser Use Cloud browsers for stealth and parallel work.
